test.name: Verify that Job Orders in Offers Pending Status should restrict the hospital from extending additional offers

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Portal And Login To HCS
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Open Portal And Login To VMS

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://h1[normalize-space()='Job Order Administration']' contains exact text 'Job Order Administration'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Build Default Message
Set Variable If
kw.msg: ${FINAL} = Expected text 'OPEN POSITIONS' but found 'OPEN POSITIONS'
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.msg: ${MESSAGE} = Expected text 'OPEN POSITIONS' but found 'OPEN POSITIONS'

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.
Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element '//span[normalize-space()='The positions for this job are filled. There are no more openings for this job.']' contains text 'The positions for this job are filled.'.
kw.arg: The positions for this job are filled.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.arg: validate that extend offer button is disabled
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: No talents with applied status found on offers pending job , please create test data
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
